---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, a new cosmetic option, or a behavior tweak.
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem you're trying to solve**

What use case are you stuck on today? Be specific — "would be nice to have X" is harder to act on than "today, when Y happens, I have to manually do Z."

**The shape of the feature you imagine**

A description of how it would work. UI sketches or links to similar features in other apps are great.

**Have you seen prior art in another Claude usage tracker?**

If so, link it. We've already cataloged the existing ones in our [README](../../README.md#why-another-one); knowing where you saw a pattern helps us evaluate it.

**Will the feature touch the data layer or only cosmetics?**

- [ ] Cosmetic / layout only (probably small)
- [ ] Touches polling, parsing, or auth (probably needs design discussion)
- [ ] Requires new permissions or network access (probably needs a security review)

**Anything you'd be willing to contribute?**

- [ ] I can test on Windows
- [ ] I can test on macOS / Linux
- [ ] I can write the code for this
- [ ] I just want to file the idea
